overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long DNN Daily ETF (DNNG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Denison Mines Corp. (NASDAQ: DNN) stock, less fees and expenses DNNG was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
